title: roegneria antiqua
intro: Roegneria antiqua, also known as the ancient grass or wild grass, is a type of perennial grass native to China and other parts of East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Roegneria antiqua include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as having antioxidant and anti-aging effects. Roegneria antiqua is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal infusions and decoctions for its medicinal and health benefits.
